author: jtraglia
content: Hey <@731289513942450317> so we don't lose channel history, what do you think about deleting `7805-focil` and then renaming/moving `inclusion-lists` to `7805-focil` here? cc <@845691100072509460>

author: jih2nn
content: Or we can keep `inclusion-lists` channel only and use this `EIP-development` group for EIPs in progress. Otherwise, if we were to move `inclusion-lists` here, we would need to move `epbs` and `block-access-lists` as well.
